title: 2018 ESL Team Form
excerpt: With the 2018 ESL season upon us, we ask that each team read, fill out and submit this form no later than October 26th at the front desk indicating: The team name The team captain The names of each player on the team How you want to split up the team fee Everyone’s initials Please … Read more
content:
With the 2018 ESL season upon us, we ask that each team read, fill out and submit this form no later than October 26th at the front desk indicating:

  • The team name
  • The team captain
  • The names of each player on the team
  • How you want to split up the team fee
  • Everyone’s initials

Please scan and email this form to info@edmontonsquashclub.ca or return it to the front desk.

Please Download the form Here
